## Release And Proof Boundary

- [ ] This PR does not approve Beta Candidate.
- [ ] This PR does not claim official UVR affiliation.
- [ ] This PR does not commit model weights, Python environments, FFmpeg binaries, proof outputs, private audio, transcripts, prompt outputs, `.env` files, logs, or generated installers.
